description_long: This is a compact electronic keyboard with a rectangular, low-profile body and a full set of piano-style keys. The top panel features a variety of colored buttons and switches, likely for sound selection, rhythm control, and other electronic functions. The casing is primarily dark gray or black, with a lighter section for the keys and a control panel that includes printed labels and possibly a small display. The rear side shows input/output ports for power and audio connections, as well as branding and model information. The keys are arranged in a standard piano layout, with alternating black and white keys. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for portable use in urban environments such as street performances, music classes, or community events.
description: A compact electronic keyboard with piano-style keys, colored control buttons, and a dark rectangular casing. It features a standard key layout and visible input/output ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full set of piano keys and the control panel with colored buttons and labels.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the keyboard and the arrangement of the keys and controls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the input/output ports, branding, and the back of the keybed.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, showing the other end of the keyboard and the continuation of the control panel.
